creator: thiago.rocha@bsd.com.br
text:
On commit r357455 [1] sparc64 support was dropped for FreeBSD13-CURRENT, but the FreeBSD website on its download/where [2] section still shows SPARC64 download link, which shows a "404 page" [3].

1 - https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base?view=revision&revision=357455
2 - https://www.freebsd.org/where.html
3 - https://download.freebsd.org/ftp/snapshots/sparc64/sparc64/ISO-IMAGES/13.0/
